author: hollowstrawberry
install_msg:
🖼 __**GPT Image**__
:warning: **Important:** OpenAI's models cost money every time they are used. Please check <https://openai.com/api/pricing/> and use this cog with care. These can range from 1 cent to 20+ cents per image depending on the config.
```Cog installed. Instructions:
1. Load it with [p]load gptimage
2. Add your OpenAI API key with [p]set api openai api_key,INSERT_API_KEY
3. Enable the /imagine slash command and the Remix app command with [p]slash enablecog gptimage
4. Sync slash commands with [p]slash sync
5. You may need to restart Discord to see the new commands.
5. The bot owner can enable image generation in specific guilds and manage quotas, with the [p]gptimage command.
6. Enjoy!```
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store user data.
